_comment: Default-value reference for run_arch_spectral_linear_stationary.py — the FIRST §9.1 architecture-aligned spectral-only experiment. Mirrors the ArchSpectralLinearStationaryConfig dataclass defaults. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults pass CLI flags. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §9.1. This is architecture-aligned support for theorem-B matched-stationary mechanisms — NOT an exact theorem proof, NOT a learned-hybrid experiment, NOT an STU/S4/SSM robustness experiment. Acceptance is qualitative.
